title: jasminum subglandulosum
intro: Jasminum subglandulosum, also known as the Chinese jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jasminum subglandulosum include reducing fever, relieving cough and asthma symptoms, and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as dried and used in capsule form, to harness its medicinal properties.
